current_goal: Prepare a stable handoff workflow with seal and diff review.
verified_facts: BaseBrief has one public skill entry.
The handoff builder can generate readable brief artifacts.
CLI Lite can run artifact checks after building outputs.
confirmed_decisions: Keep provider prompts separate from readable brief artifacts.
Use seal diff to review phase changes before sharing.
assumptions: The next agent can inspect repository files before editing.
open_questions: Whether seal diff should later feed release notes.
Whether a future seal should include adapter metadata checksums.
risk_boundaries: Do not write secrets or private absolute paths.
Do not describe estimated cost as real billing evidence.
Do not treat seal diff as a full project-management system.
expected_output: A readable handoff, adapter review notes, and seal diff summary.
tail_request: Build the handoff artifacts, run checks, and compare the new seal against the previous seal.
